board.title: Web Fundamentals
board.author: Julius Boateng
board.description: Since CERN made the Web freely available in 1993, it has transformed how people share information. This puzzle explores the fundamental technologies and concepts behind the modern Web.

clues.question: Invented the World Wide Web at CERN to improve information sharing among researchers; 2016 ACM Turing Award winner
Markup language used to define the content and structure of web documents; parsed by web browsers into the Document Object Model (DOM)
System of linked documents interconnected through hyperlinks; foundational concept behind the World Wide Web
Identifier that specifies the location of a resource on the Web
Time required for data to travel across a network; increases with physical distance and network hops
Computer or software that provides resources or services in response to client requests; designed to handle large numbers of concurrent requests
Maximum data transfer capacity of a network connection; high-resolution images and videos typically consume more of it
Client-side scripting language introduced in 1995 to make static web pages more interactive; prototyped in 10 days by Brendan Eich at Netscape
Period of interaction between a client and server spanning multiple HTTP requests, during which state is maintained
Software that fetches, renders, and browses web pages; includes a dedicated JavaScript engine
Protocol providing persistent, bidirectional communication over a single TCP connection; proposed by Ian Hickson for HTML5 in 2008
Device or application that requests resources or services from a server; classified as thin or thick based on how much processing is performed locally
Data sent by a site and stored by the browser; automatically sent with future HTTP requests to the same site
Temporary storage for previously retrieved web resources; used by browsers to reduce repeated network requests
Protocol that encrypts communication between browsers and servers using TLS; services like Let’s Encrypt made certificates freely available
